title: Platanthera biermanniana
taxonomy: Platanthera biermanniana is a species of orchid in the genus Platanthera. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within the Orchidaceae family, it is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is further divided into tribes, with Platanthera biermanniana being part of the Orchideae tribe. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the orchid family.
